data.title: ITV plc Advances Share Buyback Programme with Latest Purchase
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

ITV plc ( (GB:ITV) ) has provided an announcement.

ITV plc has announced the purchase of 3,276,674 of its ordinary shares as part of its ongoing share buyback programme, with plans to cancel the purchased shares. This transaction, executed on the London Stock Exchange, aligns with ITV’s strategy to enhance shareholder value and optimize capital structure. Following this purchase, ITV holds 120,479,277 shares in treasury, and the total number of voting rights stands at 3,779,726,809, which shareholders can use for regulatory disclosures.

More about ITV plc

ITV plc operates in the broadcasting industry, offering a range of television programming and production services. The company focuses on delivering content through its television network and associated digital platforms, catering to a diverse audience in the UK and internationally.

YTD Price Performance: -4.14%

Average Trading Volume: 10,839,879

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: £2.64B

data.title: Funding Circle Executes Share Buy-Back, Cancels 200,000 Shares
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

The latest update is out from Funding Circle Holdings Limited ( (GB:FCH) ).

Funding Circle Holdings plc, a financial company, has executed a share buy-back program on 9 January 2025, purchasing 200,000 ordinary shares from Investec Bank plc on the London Stock Exchange. The shares, purchased at prices ranging from 118.50p to 121.50p, will be canceled, reducing the company’s total issued share capital to 326,543,046 ordinary shares. This move, part of a buy-back program announced in October 2024, is expected to impact shareholder interest calculations under the FCA’s guidelines.

More about Funding Circle Holdings Limited

data.title: Sierra Madre Achieves Full Production at Guitarra Mine
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

The latest update is out from Sierra Madre Gold & Silver Ltd. ( (TSE:SM) ).

Sierra Madre Gold and Silver Ltd. has announced the commencement of full commercial production at its Guitarra Mine Complex in Mexico as of January 1, 2025. This milestone is expected to significantly enhance the company’s operational metrics, including revenues and concentrate shipments, and marks a promising outlook for future operations by establishing a strong operational culture. The successful transition to production was aided by the timely and budget-conscious repairs and upgrades performed by the company’s personnel, setting a positive trajectory for the company’s standing in the mining industry.

More about Sierra Madre Gold & Silver Ltd.

Sierra Madre Gold and Silver Ltd. is a precious metals producer and exploration company focused on the Guitarra mine in the Temascaltepec mining district, Mexico, and the exploration and development of its Tepic property in Nayarit, Mexico. The Guitarra mine includes a processing facility and is a past-producing underground mine. The company’s management team has extensive experience in managing large mineral reserves and raising significant capital for mining ventures.

Average Trading Volume: 68,722

data.title: Safran Announces €5 Billion Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

SAFRAN SA ( (FR:SAF) ) has shared an announcement.

Safran has announced a €5 billion share buyback program for cancellation between 2025 and 2028, starting with a first tranche agreement to repurchase shares worth up to €350 million from January to April 2025. This strategic financial move, approved by the shareholders’ General Meeting, signals Safran’s commitment to enhancing shareholder value and may strengthen its market positioning in the aerospace and defense sectors.

More about SAFRAN SA

Safran is an international high technology group that operates in the aviation, defense, and space markets with a focus on making air transport safer, more sustainable, and accessible. The company, which employs 92,000 people and had sales of €23.2 billion in 2023, holds leadership positions in its markets and is listed on the Euronext Paris stock exchange, being part of the CAC 40 and Euro Stoxx 50 indices.

data.title: Siemens Energy Announces Adjustment in Voting Rights
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Siemens Energy ( (DE:ENR) ) has shared an update.

Siemens Energy AG announced a change in voting rights, following the acquisition or disposal of shares by the Ministry of Finance on behalf of the State of Norway. The total voting rights, including those attached to shares and through instruments, now stand at 3.22%, down from a previous total of 3.39%. This adjustment in voting rights could influence Siemens Energy’s governance and decision-making, reflecting changes in stakeholder engagement with the company.

More about Siemens Energy

Siemens Energy AG is a leading company in the energy sector, primarily focusing on the generation, transmission, and storage of energy. Based in Munich, Germany, it operates in regulated and free markets across multiple German cities, providing innovative solutions to meet the growing energy demands globally.

AG Barr ( (GB:BAG) ) just unveiled an announcement.

AG Barr has announced a series of share transactions by its chief executive, finance director, and non-executive director under the All Employee Share Ownership Plan (AESOP). This plan allows employees to purchase company shares using salary deductions and receive matching free shares, which is aimed at aligning the interests of employees with the company’s growth. These transactions, conducted on the London Stock Exchange, emphasize the company’s commitment to employee investment and its potential impact on stakeholder confidence.

More about AG Barr

AG Barr PLC operates in the beverage industry, known primarily for its production of soft drinks. The company offers a range of products, including well-known brands such as IRN-BRU, Rubicon, and Funkin, and it focuses on expanding its market presence in the UK and internationally.

data.title: Alpha Exploration Announces Positive Drill Results from Aburna Gold District
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Alpha Exploration Ltd. ( (TSE:ALEX) ) has shared an update.

Alpha Exploration Ltd. announced new drill results from the Aburna Gold District within the Kerkasha Project in Eritrea, revealing positive assay results that align with existing models of gold mineralization. The results, from 25 drillholes in the Hill 52 and Central areas, highlight the company’s continued exploration success and support the structural controls theory of gold distribution at the site, emphasizing their strategic position in the gold exploration market.

More about Alpha Exploration Ltd.

Alpha Exploration Ltd. is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of gold projects. Their primary projects are located in Eritrea, with a significant emphasis on the Kerkasha Project, which spans 771 km² and encompasses multiple gold prospects.

data.title: INPP Acquires 150,000 Shares for Treasury
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

International Public Partnerships Limited ( (GB:INPP) ) has provided an update.

International Public Partnerships Limited announced the purchase of 150,000 ordinary shares at an average price of 115.2 GBp on the London Stock Exchange. These shares will be held in treasury, bringing the total treasury shares to 34,850,000, while 1,876,393,132 shares remain in issue. This transaction reflects the company’s ongoing strategy to manage its share capital and potentially enhance shareholder value.

More about International Public Partnerships Limited

International Public Partnerships Limited (INPP) is a listed infrastructure investment company that focuses on investing in global public infrastructure projects. These projects meet societal and environmental needs across sectors such as utility and transmission, transport, education, health, justice, and digital infrastructure, primarily in regions such as the UK, Europe, Australia, New Zealand, and North America. INPP aims to provide shareholders with long-term yield and capital growth and is advised by Amber Fund Management Limited, which manages and originates infrastructure investments.
